ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team with which the player is affiliated */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-2) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted (e.g., 1st, 2nd) */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., Regular Season, Playoffs) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced metric record */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance record this metric refers to */,
  "war_total" REAL /* Total Wins Above Replacement (WAR) */,
  "war_reg_season" REAL /* WAR during the regular season */,
  "war_playoffs" REAL /* WAR during the playoffs */,
  "predator_offense" REAL /* Predator offensive metric */,
  "predator_defense" REAL /* Predator defensive metric */,
  "predator_total" REAL /* Total predator score */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Win Shares */,
  "win_shares_per_48_minutes" REAL /* Win Shares per 48 minutes */,
  "box_plus_minus" REAL /* Box Plus-Minus (BPM) */,
  "value_over_replacement_player" REAL /* Value Over Replacement Player (VORP) */,
  "offensive_win_shares" REAL /* Offensive Win Shares */,
  "defensive_win_shares" REAL /* Defensive Win Shares */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team in the season */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team in the season */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating playoff appearance */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Home wins in the season */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Away wins in the season */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Home losses in the season */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Away losses in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "point_differential" INTEGER /* Point differential (points scored - points allowed) */,
  "pythagorean_win_percentage" REAL /* Pythagorean win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_name FOREIGN KEY ("team_name") REFERENCES players ("team")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the organization (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who conducted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating given by the analyst (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific game being reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES user_access ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season during which the game was played */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team's name */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team's name */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "home_team_score_1st_qtr" INTEGER /* Home team score in the first quarter */,
  "home_team_score_2nd_qtr" INTEGER /* Home team score in the second quarter */,
  "home_team_score_3rd_qtr" INTEGER /* Home team score in the third quarter */,
  "home_team_score_4th_qtr" INTEGER /* Home team score in the fourth quarter */,
  "away_team_score_1st_qtr" INTEGER /* Away team score in the first quarter */,
  "away_team_score_2nd_qtr" INTEGER /* Away team score in the second quarter */,
  "away_team_score_3rd_qtr" INTEGER /* Away team score in the third quarter */,
  "away_team_score_4th_qtr" INTEGER /* Away team score in the fourth quarter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
